cards.code: record Order(int Items, decimal Cost); static decimal Discount(Order o) => o switch { { Items: > 10, Cost: > 1000.00m } => 0.10m, { Items: > 5, Cost: > 500.00m } => 0.05m, { Cost: > 250.00m } => 0.02m, null => throw new System.ArgumentNullException(), _ => 0m }; System.Console.WriteLine(Discount(new Order(12, 1200m))); System.Console.WriteLine(Discount(new Order(6, 600m))); System.Console.WriteLine(Discount(new Order(1, 300m)));

System.Console.WriteLine(Classify(new Point(0,0))); System.Console.WriteLine(Classify(new Point(1,0))); System.Console.WriteLine(Classify(new Point(3,4))); static string Classify(Point pt) => pt switch { (0, 0) => "Origin", (1, 0) => "positive X basis end", (0, 1) => "positive Y basis end", _ => "Just a point" }; public readonly struct Point { public int X { get; } public int Y { get; } public Point(int x, int y) => (X, Y) = (x, y); public void Deconstruct(out int x, out int y) => (x, y) = (X, Y); }
cards.expectedOutput:
Origin
positive X basis end
Just a point

cards.prompt: Extended property pattern { Start.Y: 0 }: OnXAxis двух сегментов?
cards.code: record Point(int X, int Y); record Segment(Point Start, Point End); static bool OnXAxis(Segment s) => s is { Start.Y: 0 } or { End.Y: 0 }; System.Console.WriteLine(OnXAxis(new Segment(new Point(1,0), new Point(2,2)))); System.Console.WriteLine(OnXAxis(new Segment(new Point(1,1), new Point(2,2))));
